name: Analytics overview dashboard
description: Implement the analytics overview dashboard. Backend: GET /api/v1/analytics/overview?period=YYYY-MM (returns: total spend for period, spend by day time-series, top-5 categories by spend keyed by the global category catalog with amount and percent, and total expense count). All aggregates respect visibility rules — private expenses excluded from household totals. Frontend: Analytics/Insights page — period selector (default current month), total spend hero number, spend-over-time line or bar chart, category breakdown pie/bar chart with ranked list. Category labels/icon/color resolve from the static catalog by key rather than from expense-local labels. Per docs/product-specs/analytics-overview.md. Does NOT require budget data (feat-027 is NOT a dependency) — analytics is pure expense aggregation. Does NOT include month-over-month comparison or group breakdowns (feat-029).
evidence: Added GET /api/v1/analytics/overview with monthly visibility-safe aggregates, replaced /insights placeholder with analytics dashboard UI, added focused worker/web tests, and passed full ./init.sh verification on 2026-05-04. Follow-up on 2026-05-21 fixed the insights month-selector regression so choosing an older month no longer removes newer month options from the dropdown; focused insights-period regression tests and final repo verification passed.
